items.title: Promotional material: UK-India Trade Deal: Double Contributions Convention explainer
items.summary: Information on the Double Contributions Convention that the UK and India have agreed.

items.title: The countdown begins: UK-India FTA enters into force on July 15th
items.summary: Businesses to start preparations for historic UK-India trade deal worth £4.8bn to enter into force next month.

items.title: Fairer, faster redress in the energy market
items.summary: We are seeking views on strengthening the role and powers of the Energy Ombudsman in the retail energy market.

items.title: Reforming Consumer Protection for Home Upgrade Schemes
items.summary: We're seeking views on how the consumer protection system for home upgrades should be reformed to support delivery of the Warm Homes Plan.

items.title: Greater protections to restore families' trust in home upgrades
items.summary: Action to protect families in the energy market and hold the retrofit industry to account.

items.title: Guidance: Buying or selling  a business with a gangmaster’s licence
items.summary: Check if you need to apply for a new gangmaster’s licence when you buy a business.

items.title: Official Statistics: DBT inward investment results 2025 to 2026
items.summary: Department for Business and Trade (DBT) statistics showing results for inward investment projects which landed in the UK in the 2025 to 2026 financial year.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 22 June 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Official Statistics: Warm Home Discount report: 2025/26
items.summary: The report includes data on the number and type of households receiving an energy rebate through the Warm Home Discount scheme in scheme year 15, 2025/26. These statistics also estimate the total value of energy rebates issued.

items.title: Notice: Apply for the Heat Network Efficiency Scheme (HNES)
items.summary: The Heat Network Efficiency Scheme supports performance improvements to existing district heating or communal heating projects.

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Ready Programme Round 2: innovation funding competition
items.summary: Apply to the Heat Pump Ready Programme Round 2 innovation funding competition.

items.title: Policy paper: Supply Chain Centre mission statement and action plan
items.summary: Sets out the Supply Chain Centre's aims and a 14-point action plan to help secure critical inputs for the UK economy and support long-term business growth.

items.title: UK Trade Tariff: duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas
items.summary: Temporary duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas (ATQs) for importing goods into the UK.

items.title: More families to benefit from lower bills through plug-in panels
items.summary: Retailers join government plans to bring plug-in solar panels to UK homes, helping families  save money on bills.

items.title: Guidance: How to apply for or renew a gangmaster's licence
items.summary: How to apply for or renew a licence to provide or use workers in agriculture, horticulture, shellfish gathering, or processing and packaging of food or drink.

items.title: Plug-in solar: Regulatory amendment and interim product specification
items.summary: We're seeking views on proposals to enable the safe and legal use of plug-in solar (plug-in microgeneration) products in the UK.

items.title: Research: Plug-in solar electrical safety study
items.summary: Testing of representative plug-in solar systems to assess compatibility with UK domestic electrical installations.

items.title: Research: Public Sector Decarbonisation Scheme: delivery data
items.summary: This release contains data on Public Sector Decarbonisation Scheme (PSDS) phases 1 to 4, provided to DESNZ via Salix Finance.

items.title: HSE - Health and Safety Executive
items.summary: HSE is a national regulator and government department that supports employers, businesses and employees.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Decision: Westermost Rough Offshore Wind Farm: application for a safety zone, Energy Act 2004
items.summary: Decision by the Secretary of State on application for a safety zone under the Energy Act 2004.

items.title: Detailed guidance on who needs a gangmaster’s licence
items.summary: A detailed explanation for labour providers and labour users on when a Fair Work Agency gangmaster's licence is needed.

items.title: Official Statistics: UK trade in numbers
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s latest trade and investment position, summarising statistics produced by ONS, DBT, and UNCTAD.

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund: April 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Headline Release (monthly data)
items.summary: Headline Household Energy Efficiency statistics under the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal Framework.

items.title: Transparency data: UK-Moldova trade agreement 2026 UK-Moldova Dialogue in Trade Configuration – joint minutes, 23 April 2026
items.summary: Summary of the discussion of the second UK-Moldova Dialogue in Trade Configuration under the UK-Moldova Strategic Partnership, Trade and Cooperation Agreement.

items.title: Government backing helps UK’s Rolls-Royce SMR win multibillion-pound Sweden nuclear export contract
items.summary: Rolls-Royce SMR has been selected by the Swedish development company Videberg Kraft to build small modular reactors (SMRs) in Sweden, marking a major multibillion-pound export win for the UK and a breakthrough moment for British nuclear.

items.title: Government backing helps UK’s Rolls-Royce SMR win multibillion-pound Sweden nuclear export contract
items.summary: Rolls-Royce SMR has been selected by the Swedish development company Videberg Kraft to build small modular reactors (SMRs) in Sweden, marking a major multibillion-pound export win for the UK and a breakthrough moment for British nuclear.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notices: anti-dumping duty on steel reinforcing bars and rods from China
items.summary: Trade remedies notices published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the anti-dumping duty on steel reinforcing bars and rods from China.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Form: EU Battery Passport requirements survey
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) is seeking views from the battery sector on the upcoming EU Battery Passport requirements.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.summary: Middle Super Output Area (MSOA) level estimates for the number of domestic properties without mains gas from 2015 to 2025

items.title: Transparency data: Birthday Honours 2026: Department for Business and Trade
items.summary: Recipients of the King’s Birthday Honours List 2026, sponsored by the Department for Business and Trade (DBT).

items.title: Notice: General Trade Licence for sanctioned processed oil products
items.summary: The General Trade Licence for sanctioned processed oil products permits certain activities prohibited under the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019.

items.title: Notice: Notice to Importers 2953: Russia import sanctions
items.summary: Import prohibitions in force under the Russia Sanctions Regulations 2019, as amended. It should be read alongside the statutory guidance.

items.title: UK to set end date for imports of Russian diesel and jet fuel via third countries
items.summary: The Government has today confirmed the timeline for phasing in its ban on imports of refined oil derived from Russia, as part of the recently announced package of sanctions to further squeeze Putin’s war machine.

items.title: New champion to be appointed for Britain’s mutuals and co-operatives
items.summary: Plans for a new champion for mutuals and co-ops have been unveiled in a speech by the Economic Secretary to the Treasury in Birmingham today.
